page: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server powered by an AMD EPYC Milan processor. It features 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs running at 2.3 GHz, utilizing the x86_64 architecture with no hyperthreading. The hardware configuration includes 64.0 GB of RAM, providing 2.0 GB of memory per core, alongside a 400 GB local NVMe SSD and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps.

In benchmark testing, the c3-64 demonstrates strong compute and memory capabilities. Its single-core stress-ng performance and Passmark memory score both rank in the top tier (top 10%), while multi-core CPU performance and Geekbench scores consistently place in the top 25%. Database operations on Passmark also achieve top-tier status, supported by strong Redis SET performance of 77.38 million operations per second. For lightweight language model tasks, text generation with a 135M parameter model reaches top-tier speeds, though performance scales down to average levels for larger 7B parameter models.

The server offers high resource density for compute-heavy workloads, delivering dedicated physical cores without hyperthreading overhead. However, with only 2.0 GB of RAM per core, it may face limitations in memory-intensive environments. The inclusion of a 400 GB NVMe SSD and strong database benchmark results make it highly suitable for database hosting, software compilation, ray tracing, and high-throughput web serving.
description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server featuring 32 dedicated physical cores and 32 vCPUs on the AMD EPYC Milan x86_64 architecture. Operating at 2.3 GHz with no hyperthreading, the instance is equipped with 64.0 GB of RAM, a 400 GB local NVMe SSD, and a baseline network bandwidth of 4 Gbps. Benchmark evaluations place its single-core CPU performance and Passmark memory score in the top 10%, with strong multi-core and database execution capabilities ranking in the top 25%. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio makes it highly efficient for compute-bound tasks, though it presents a tradeoff for memory-heavy applications. It is well-suited for database operations, software compilation, and lightweight machine learning inference.
og_description: OVHcloud c3-64 is a compute-optimized server with 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and a 400 GB NVMe SSD, delivering top-tier single-core and database benchmark performance.
meta_description: OVHcloud c3-64 features 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan cores, 64 GB RAM, and 400 GB NVMe storage, optimized for compute-heavy and database workloads.
tagline: A dedicated thirty-two core compute instance featuring high-speed NVMe storage and top-tier single-core processing performance.
bullet_points: 32 dedicated AMD EPYC Milan physical cores with no hyperthreading.
64.0 GB of system memory and 400 GB of local NVMe SSD storage.
Top-tier single-core CPU and database benchmark performance.
4 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with one public IPv4 address.
Optimized for software compilation, database hosting, and web serving.
